use_cases: Creates customizable dot grid backgrounds for hero sections and landing pages
Adds subtle visual depth and texture to card components and containers
Generates decorative patterns for branding and marketing materials
Provides customizable SVG patterns for any design requiring dot grids
ai_summary: A lightweight SVG dot pattern component that renders customizable circular dot grids as background decorations. Configurable via props for width, height, position, and circle radius. Includes responsive fill colors with opacity control and integrates seamlessly as a decorative background layer in any UI context.
